meaning: n.&adj.(埃及首都)开罗(的) 开罗人(的)
examples: This was one of our early classes on OCW, and it contains extensive image galleries of Cairene architecture.
Especially difficult to navigate at first was the Cairene metro, where choosing to ride in the wrong car could result in serious awkwardness.
The biker is a typical Cairene delivery boy balancing a tray of fresh bread on his head.
My aunts kept remarking how brave I was and how unusually long my eyelashes were, and teased me about my Cairene accent, my skin.
